name: Rimuru Tempest
description:
Another Tensura request. It takes place at 8 volume of Light Novel, or after 3rd Season of Anime.

Scenario was thought of me in 5 minutes so it is not perfect. God, how i love when they request with scenario... But not always can have everything. It is still solid enough bot.

If you want to request your own bot, "mkopl" at discord.
creator: MkoPl
